name: Data Base
definition: Core data utilities and interfaces for Zopio framework that provides a standardized foundation for data operations across all providers and UI components

modules.name: CRUD Provider
modules.definition: Standard interface for data providers that implement CRUD operations

modules.name: Operation Parameters
modules.importCode: import type { GetListParams, GetOneParams, CreateParams, UpdateParams, DeleteParams } from '@repo/data-base';

modules.name: Operation Results
modules.importCode: import type { GetListResult, GetOneResult, CreateResult, UpdateResult, DeleteResult } from '@repo/data-base';

modules.name: Provider Creation
modules.definition: Utilities for creating and registering data providers

modules.name: Extended Provider
modules.definition: Extended provider interface with batch operations and transactions

modules.name: Advanced Queries
modules.definition: Advanced query parameters for complex data operations
